pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Heroku Maven plugin with Surefire plugin for testing.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Configure Maven Assembly Plugin to execute during package phase.
Add JNA dependency for native access.
Add Lob Java SDK for mail services.
Add Google Tink GCP KMS integration.
Add Google HTTP Client Jackson2 integration.
Add JJWT library for JWT handling.
Add JUnit Vintage Engine for legacy test support.
Remove PowerMock dependencies in favor of Mockito.
Define project build source encoding as UTF-8.
Define Maven compiler plugin version property.
Set explicit source and test source directories.

src/main/App.java.general_idea: Replace inline Javalin server configuration and route registration with a centralized application factory method.
Remove unused imports related to the removed inline server setup and controllers.
src/main/App.java.before: import Config.Env; import Config.MongoConfig; import Organization.OrganizationController; import User.UserController; import io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.Dotenv; import io.javalin.Javalin; import io.javalin.core.compression.Brotli; import io.javalin.core.compression.Gzip;

src/main/App.java.general_idea: Add imports for the new centralized configuration classes.
Remove the static constant for async timeout which is no longer used in the main class.
Remove the large block of API documentation comments that were embedded in the main method.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Migrate environment variable loading from dotenv library to standard System.getenv.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: The `io.github.cdimascio.dotenv` library is an optional dependency; removing it simplifies the build and relies on standard JDK functionality available in all Java versions.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Refactor database access to use a DeploymentLevel enum instead of a dynamic string name.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: This is a structural refactor to improve type safety and configuration management, not a JDK compatibility requirement.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Add explicit resource cleanup method for the MongoDB client.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: Best practice addition for resource management, not required for compilation or basic runtime functionality.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Add utility method to drop a database by deployment level.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: New feature addition for testing/management purposes, not a migration requirement.

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Refactor enum to implement a Message interface and add JSON serialization methods for API responses.
Add imports for Message interface and JSONObject class.
Replace simple enum constants with constructor arguments providing error messages.
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.before:
ORG_EXISTS, SUCCESSFUL_ENROLLMENT, PASS_HASH_FAILURE, FIELD_EMPTY, NAME_LEN_OVER_30, VALID, EMAIL_LEN_OVER_40
    ,INVALID_CHARACTERS_FN, INVALID_CHARACTERS_LN, INVALID_CHARACTERS_E, INVALID_CHARACTERS_ORG, PASS_UNDER_8;
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.after:
ORG_EXISTS("ORG_EXISTS: Organization Exists Already"),
  SUCCESSFUL_ENROLLMENT("SUCCESSFUL_ENROLLMENT: Please Wait 1-3 Business Days For Response"),
  PASS_HASH_FAILURE("PASS_HASH_FAILURE: Server Password Failure, Please Try Again"),
  FIELD_EMPTY(""),
  NAME_LEN_OVER_30(""),
  EMAIL_LEN_OVER_40(""),
  INVALID_CHARACTERS(""),
  PASS_UNDER_8(""),
  INVALID_PARAMETER("INVALID_PARAMETER: Please Check Input"),
  FAIL_TO_CREATE("Could not create user and/or org"),
  SUCCESS("SUCCESS: Success");

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Add field and constructor to store error message string.
Add helper methods to parse error name and description from the message string.
Add methods to serialize the enum status to a JSONObject.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Refactor controller to use dependency injection and service layer pattern instead of static handlers and direct database access.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.before: public static Handler enrollOrganization = ctx -> { ... MongoDatabase database = MongoConfig.getMongoClient() ... }
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.after: public class OrganizationController { MongoDatabase db; ... public OrganizationController(MongoDatabase db, ...) { ... } public Handler enrollOrganization = ctx -> { ... EnrollOrganizationService eoService = new EnrollOrganizationService(db, ...) ... } }

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.before: Argon2 argon2 = Argon2Factory.create(); ... passwordHash = argon2.hash(10, 65536, 1, passwordArr);

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Update organization enrollment form fields to match new frontend requirements (e.g., splitting name, adding birth date, EIN).

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.after: String firstName = req.getString("firstname"); ... String orgEIN = req.getString("organizationEIN");

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Remove dependency on Auth0 JWT library which is no longer used in the new authentication flow.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The Auth0 JWT library is no longer referenced in the code; keeping the imports is unnecessary and may cause unused dependency warnings or conflicts.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Remove dependency on Argon2 password hashing library as logic is moved to services.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The Argon2 library is no longer directly used in this controller; keeping the imports is unnecessary.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Remove legacy MongoConfig import as database access is now injected.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The `MongoConfig` class is no longer used in this file; keeping the import is unnecessary.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Remove legacy BSON Document import as data access is abstracted via DAOs.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The `org.bson.Document` class is no longer directly used in this controller; keeping the import is unnecessary.
